prompt: Break this implementation plan into child issues: add workspace onboarding that guides a new admin through inviting teammates, connecting Slack, and completing the first project setup. We need design review before changing the onboarding UI.
assertions: Marks the design review as HITL and implementation slices as AFK where possible.
Avoids a single large issue covering inviting teammates and Slack and first project setup together.
Uses dependencies only where a slice truly cannot start before another, and reflects that in the execution waves or ready-order guidance.
Includes manual verification steps appropriate to onboarding behavior.
Splits any Large or XL slice into smaller S/M vertical issues.
